_source:
Live AuthKit on beta.tailorbird.com → stalwart-collection-11-staging.authkit.app. Each scenario was exercised in MCP browser 2026-05-04; DOM had no [role=alert] nodes in page.evaluate — errors are inline text and/or

for the credentials banner.

_mcpVerifiedScenarios.noteLongEmail: Very long valid-form email (180x a + @t.co) reached /password in MCP; wrong password then shows Invalid email or password
